plugins.name: testing-sentinel
plugins.description: Automated testing best practices enforcer inspired by SQLite, Chromium, NASA/JPL, curl, and Redis.

plugins.name: saas-architect
plugins.description: Assistente completo para construção de SaaS — do ICP ao scale. Cobre validação, pricing, onboarding, billing, métricas, retenção e crescimento, baseado em práticas de Stripe, Slack, HubSpot, Notion, Calendly e Figma.

plugins.name: browser-devtools
plugins.description: Browser automation for Claude Code: open pages, take screenshots, inspect HTML/DOM, monitor console & network errors, run Lighthouse audits, execute JavaScript, check accessibility — all from natural language.
